raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/year> I rented a room for family coming into town for a surprise party. The hotel is saying someone in the room smoked and charged me {$250.00} smoking fees. No one in the room smokes or vapes. I tried to dispute it with the hotel with no response. I disputed it with Citibank and the hotel sent them paperwork showing the change in air quality. The people who stayed in this room do not smoke. I have read what can trigger the sensor perfume, humidity etc
